task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a tiddler titled 'METAR Codes'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tiddler exists with the exact title 'METAR Codes' in the TiddlyWiki interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'METAR Codes' tiddler has the content type 'application/x-tiddler-dictionary'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The type field in the edit view of the 'METAR Codes' tiddler is set to 'application/x-tiddler-dictionary'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'METAR Codes' tiddler contains the 8 specified METAR codes and their meanings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The body of the 'METAR Codes' tiddler contains the key-value pairs (BR: Mist, DZ: Drizzle, FG: Fog, FZ: Freezing, GR: Hail, RA: Rain, SN: Snow, TS: Thunderstorm) formatted as a dictionary (key: value).

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a tiddler titled 'Weather Code Reference' with the tag 'Reference'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tiddler exists with the title 'Weather Code Reference' and a tag pill labeled 'Reference'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Weather Code Reference' tiddler contains TiddlyWiki list iteration and dictionary lookup syntax.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The edit view of 'Weather Code Reference' shows TiddlyWiki widget/filter syntax (e.g., <$list filter="[indexes[METAR Codes]]"> or similar) to fetch data, rather than plain text.

task_completion.description: Verify the rendered 'Weather Code Reference' tiddler displays the bulleted list correctly formatted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The rendered view of 'Weather Code Reference' shows a bulleted list where the keys are bolded and followed by the value (e.g., '* **BR**: Mist', '* **DZ**: Drizzle').

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not hardcode the bulleted list in the 'Weather Code Reference' tiddler.
integrity.visual_evidence: The edit mode of 'Weather Code Reference' does not contain the literal strings 'BR: Mist', 'DZ: Drizzle', etc., but rather uses variables/macros to generate them.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the TiddlyWiki web interface to create the tiddlers.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the TiddlyWiki UI in a web browser, not a terminal or text editor modifying backend files directly.

integrity.description: Ensure the dictionary tiddler is formatted as a raw dictionary without markdown interference.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'METAR Codes' tiddler edit view shows plain 'key: value' pairs without markdown bullets or other formatting that would break the 'application/x-tiddler-dictionary' parsing.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dictionary tiddler must be titled 'METAR Codes' with type 'application/x-tiddler-dictionary'. It must contain exactly these pairs: BR: Mist, DZ: Drizzle, FG: Fog, FZ: Freezing, GR: Hail, RA: Rain, SN: Snow, TS: Thunderstorm. The reference tiddler must be titled 'Weather Code Reference', tagged 'Reference', and dynamically generate a list formatted as '* **Key**: Value' using TiddlyWiki list/dictionary syntax.
